rationale: The score is identical (6/10) in both evaluations, and the justification, strengths, and concerns track the same substance: strong full-stack and multi-language experience, proven scalable-systems and open-source work, and a consistent gap around experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry, and AI-driven growth tooling. The wording differs and the examples cited vary slightly (e.g., 'Dunnhumby' vs 'DLang, microservices'), but these are ordinary run-to-run rewordings, not penalties. Nothing in the variant keys off the candidate's location, nationality, or any demographic signal, so the location change from Berlin to São Paulo had no effect on the assessment.
